source: OpenRouter chat completions with Gemini vision over local Beauty and the Barber assets

assets.title: Barber Shop Interior Wide Shot
assets.description: A wide shot of a modern barber shop interior with two barber chairs, large windows, and a television playing on the wall.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing the overall salon environment.

assets.title: Barber Shop Interior with Mirrors
assets.description: An interior view of a barber shop featuring two barber chairs, large mirrors, and windows looking out onto a street.
assets.notes: Highlights the spaciousness and natural light of the salon.

assets.title: Barber Shop Interior with Waiting Area
assets.description: A view of a barber shop interior showing two barber chairs, a waiting area with stools, and framed pictures on the wall.
assets.notes: Showcases the full salon setup including the waiting area.

assets.title: Hair Washing Station
assets.description: A well-lit hair washing station with a comfortable brown leather chair, white cabinets, and a modern light fixture.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing salon amenities.

assets.title: Salon Reception and Retail Area
assets.description: A modern salon reception area featuring a desk with a laptop, retail shelving, a large illuminated mirror, and wood flooring.
assets.notes: Highlights the welcoming and organized space.

assets.title: Stylist at Reception
assets.description: A female stylist in black attire stands smiling with her arm raised behind a reception desk with a tablet, in a modern salon setting.
assets.notes: Ideal for staff introductions and a friendly brand image.

assets.title: Salon Product Display
assets.description: A well-lit, five-shelf display of various hair and beauty products in colorful packaging, set against a white wall with a light wood floor.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing product range and salon aesthetic.

assets.title: Barber Cut Profile
assets.description: A man with a fresh, sharp fade haircut, viewed in profile, sitting in a barber chair with a classic barber shop background.
assets.notes: Highlights the precision of a barber's work.

assets.title: Barber Cut Close-up
assets.description: A close-up of a man with a modern fade haircut, looking slightly to the side, with a classic barber shop interior in the background.
assets.notes: Focuses on the client's satisfaction and haircut detail.

assets.title: Barber Haircut in Progress
assets.description: A barber with a beard and black shirt is giving a client a haircut using clippers and a red comb, with the client's back to the camera.
assets.notes: Good for showing the barber's technique and focus.

assets.title: Barber Combing Client's Hair
assets.description: A barber is combing a smiling client's hair with a black comb, with the client wearing a blue and black checkered cape.
assets.notes: Highlights client interaction and the start of a cut.

assets.title: Barber Trimming Hair with Scissors
assets.description: A barber is carefully trimming a client's hair with scissors, with the client looking down and wearing a blue and black checkered cape.
assets.notes: Showcases precision and attention to detail in a haircut.

assets.title: Barber Styling Hair
assets.description: A barber sprays a client's hair with product, preparing it for styling, with a neon barber pole sign visible in the background.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing barber services and salon atmosphere.

assets.title: Barber Cutting Hair
assets.description: A close-up, over-the-shoulder shot of a barber meticulously cutting a client's hair with scissors and a comb.
assets.notes: Focuses on the detail and precision of a haircut.

assets.title: Barber Trimming Beard
assets.description: An over-the-shoulder view of a barber using an electric trimmer to meticulously shape a client's beard.
assets.notes: Highlights beard trimming and grooming services.

assets.title: Neck Shave with Straight Razor
assets.description: A barber uses a straight razor to shave the back of a client's neck, with shaving cream visible.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing precision shaving services.

assets.title: Client Mirror View
assets.description: A smiling barber holds a mirror for a client to view their fresh haircut, with both smiling in the reflection.
assets.notes: Highlights client satisfaction and barber interaction.

assets.title: Facial Shave with Straight Razor
assets.description: A barber carefully shaves a client's face with a straight razor, with a window view in the background.
assets.notes: Emphasizes traditional shaving services and attention to detail.

assets.title: Barber Shaving Client
assets.description: A barber in a brown leather apron shaves a client's face, who is covered by a blue and black checkered cape and black towel.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing shaving services and barber skill.

assets.title: Client Before Haircut
assets.description: A young male client with medium-length brown hair and a light mustache sits in a barber chair, wearing a blue and black checkered cape, before a haircut.
assets.notes: Ideal for 'before' shot in a before-and-after series.

assets.title: Client After Haircut
assets.description: A young male client with a fresh, short haircut sits in a barber chair, wearing a blue and black checkered cape, after a haircut.
assets.notes: Ideal for 'after' shot in a before-and-after series.

assets.title: Man with Fade Haircut
assets.description: A man with a fresh fade haircut and gray hair, wearing a blue and black checkered barber cape, with his eyes closed and a soft smile.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing barbering skills, especially fades and men's cuts.

assets.title: Smiling Man with Classic Haircut
assets.description: A smiling man with a classic, neatly trimmed haircut, wearing a barber cape, with a blurred barber shop interior in the background.
assets.notes: Highlights a clean, traditional men's haircut in a barber shop setting.

assets.title: Cassie, Stylist Profile
assets.description: A female stylist, Cassie, stands confidently next to a barber chair in a salon with a white brick wall background.
assets.notes: Ideal for staff profiles or 'meet the team' sections, showcasing a professional yet approachable image.

assets.title: Christina Profile
assets.description: A smiling woman in a black top holds up a pink lash brush under an arched light, with beauty tools on a table.
assets.notes: Good for staff profiles or promoting lash services.

assets.title: Blonde Color Correction Before and After
assets.description: A side-by-side comparison showing hair before (dark brown/red) and after (light blonde with waves) a color correction.
assets.notes: Excellent for showcasing color correction services.

assets.title: Balayage Hair Treatment
assets.description: A back view of a person with long, wavy blonde balayage hair against a light grey wooden wall.
assets.notes: Ideal for showcasing balayage or hair styling services.

assets.title: Copper Balayage Waves
assets.description: A close-up, rear view of a woman's shoulder-length hair styled in loose waves with a rich copper balayage.
assets.notes: Highlights hair color and texture.

assets.title: Long Golden Balayage
assets.description: A rear view of a woman's long, wavy hair featuring a beautiful golden balayage, cascading down her back.
assets.notes: Showcases long hair and balayage technique.

assets.title: Ash Blonde Balayage Bob
assets.description: A rear view of a woman's medium-length wavy hair with a sophisticated ash blonde balayage.
assets.notes: Features a modern hair color and style.

assets.title: Balayage Hair Color
assets.description: A young woman with long, wavy brown hair featuring golden balayage highlights, looking towards the camera with a slight smile.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing balayage technique.

assets.title: Burgundy Hair Color
assets.description: A woman with vibrant, curly burgundy hair and bangs, looking slightly to the side against a light brick wall.
assets.notes: Highlights a bold color treatment.

assets.title: Lavender Hair Color
assets.description: The back view of a person with long, wavy lavender hair, showcasing the vibrant color and texture against a light brick wall.
assets.notes: Excellent for displaying creative color and length.

assets.title: Lavender Hair Color
assets.description: A young woman with long, wavy lavender hair looks directly at the camera against a white brick wall.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing modern hair color trends.

assets.title: Mermaid Hair Color
assets.description: A woman's long, wavy hair features vibrant shades of blue, teal, and purple, viewed from the back.
assets.notes: Highlights creative and multi-tonal hair coloring.

assets.title: Neon Melt Hair Color
assets.description: A woman's long, wavy hair showcases a vibrant neon pink and orange color melt, viewed from the back against a white brick wall.
assets.notes: Excellent for demonstrating bold and bright hair color services.

assets.title: Pink Hair Color Treatment
assets.description: A close-up shot of vibrant pink and peach-toned hair, showcasing a fresh color treatment.
assets.notes: Good for highlighting creative color services.

assets.title: Platinum Blonde Bob
assets.description: A side profile of a person with a stylish, wavy platinum blonde bob haircut against a light blue background.
assets.notes: Highlights modern blonde styles and cuts.

assets.title: Platinum Blonde Before and After
assets.description: A split image showing a before and after of long hair, transforming from dull brown to bright platinum blonde.
assets.notes: Excellent for demonstrating dramatic hair transformation capabilities.

assets.title: Vibrant Purple Hair
assets.description: A smiling woman with vibrant purple, wavy hair and bangs, wearing a black and gold embroidered jacket, against a white brick wall.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing bold color treatments.

assets.title: Smiling Redhead
assets.description: A smiling woman with shoulder-length, wavy red hair, wearing a cream-colored ribbed sweater, against a plain white background.
assets.notes: Ideal for showcasing natural-looking red hair color.

assets.title: Red to Gold Ombre
assets.description: A woman with long, wavy hair transitioning from dark red at the roots to golden blonde at the ends, viewed from behind, standing outdoors.
assets.notes: Excellent for demonstrating ombre or balayage techniques.

assets.title: Unicorn Hair Color
assets.description: A vibrant and multi-colored hair treatment featuring shades of pink, purple, blue, and silver, styled with a half-up bun.
assets.notes: High-impact image for showcasing creative color services.

assets.title: Enzo Barber Profile
assets.description: A male barber with a beard and apron sits in a barber chair, holding scissors and smiling at the camera in a well-lit salon.
assets.notes: Good for staff introductions and showing the salon environment.

assets.title: Classic Fade Haircut
assets.description: A close-up, rear-side view of a man with a clean, short fade haircut and a beard, wearing a blue and black barber cape.
assets.notes: Clear example of a fade haircut, suitable for barber service showcases.

assets.title: Clean Fade Haircut
assets.description: A close-up, side profile of a man with a fresh fade haircut and a well-groomed beard, wearing a blue and black checkered barber cape.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing barbering skills and fade techniques.

assets.title: Woman with Long Dark Hair
assets.description: A woman with long, dark hair and a casual t-shirt, holding a lollipop, with a decorative mirror and white table in the background.
assets.notes: Could be used to represent a client or a relaxed salon atmosphere.

assets.title: Hair Extensions Before and After
assets.description: A split image showing a woman's blonde hair before (straight) and after (wavy) hair extensions, with her wearing a black face mask.
assets.notes: Excellent for demonstrating the transformation and quality of hair extension services.

assets.title: Before and After Hair Extensions
assets.description: A split image showing a woman's hair before and after hair extensions, with the 'after' side featuring longer, wavy, highlighted hair.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing hair extension services.

assets.title: Wavy Balayage Hair Extensions
assets.description: A back view of a woman with long, wavy brown hair featuring warm balayage highlights against a blue background.
assets.notes: Highlights balayage and extensions.

assets.title: Blonde Wavy Hairstyle
assets.description: A woman with long, wavy blonde hair and a bright pink top, looking down slightly against a blue background.
assets.notes: Showcases a blonde wavy style.

assets.title: Head Spa Treatment
assets.description: A woman with her eyes closed is receiving a head spa treatment with water flowing over her head from a golden ring.
assets.notes: High-quality image suitable for showcasing luxury services.

assets.title: Salon Station with Green Wall
assets.description: An empty salon station features a green accent wall decorated with pampas grass and string lights, with a brown salon chair and wash basin.
assets.notes: Good for showing salon ambiance and individual styling areas.

assets.title: Salon Reception Desk
assets.description: Two women, likely staff, are smiling and interacting at a modern reception desk with a tablet and a drink dispenser in a salon setting.
assets.notes: Ideal for 'about us' or 'meet the team' sections, conveying a welcoming atmosphere.

assets.title: Curly Taper Fade
assets.description: A close-up, side profile of a person with dark, curly hair featuring a clean taper fade.
assets.notes: Good for showcasing detailed barber work.

assets.title: Textured Mullet Fade
assets.description: A side profile of a man with a beard and a textured mullet haircut featuring a high taper fade.
assets.notes: Highlights a modern, edgy barber style.

assets.title: Beauty and the Barber Logo
assets.description: A black and white circular logo with 'Beauty and the Barber' text and intertwined 'B's in the center.
assets.notes: Vector format ideal for scalability; can be overlaid on various backgrounds.

assets.title: Beauty and the Barber Black Logo
assets.description: A black and white logo featuring a stylized 'B' with a barber pole design and a woman's silhouette, with the words 'Beauty & the Barber' below.
assets.notes: This logo is designed for use on light backgrounds.
